en: It's... It's a dinosaur. Uh-huh. You're dead.
You crazy son of a bitch. You're dead. I can just tear up the whole book on it.
Cold-bloodedness, it doesn't apply. They're totally wrong. This is a horn-bonded creature.
ko: 이건 규칙을 무시해도 돼. 냉혈성은 적용되지 않아. 그들은 완전히 틀렸어. 이건 온혈 생물이야.

en: This thing doesn't live in a swamp. This thing's got, what, a 25, 27-foot neck?
A Black Desola 30. Oh, my God. Oh, my God.
ko: 브라키오사우루스? 오, 세상에. 오, 세상에. 오, 세상에. 오, 세상에. 오, 세상에.
